name: Lebkuchen Cookie Mix (from Germany)
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Candied fruits and peels, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir together the flour, nutmeg, cinnamon, soda, cloves, and allspice.
2. In a large mixing bowl, beat the egg; add brown sugar and beat with an electric mixer on medium speed until fluffy.
3. Stir in honey and molasses.
4. Add dry ingredients to the molasses mixture; beat until the mixture is well combined.
5. Stir in almonds and fruits and peels.
6. Cover; chill for several hours.
7. On a floured surface, roll dough into a 14-inch square.
8. Cut into 3 1/2 x 2-inch rectangles.
9. Place the cookies about 2 inches apart on a greased cookie sheet.
10. Bake at 375 degrees for 12 to 14 minutes or until done.
11. Cool cookies about 1 minute; remove to wire rack.
12. While cookies are warm, brush with the Lemon Glaze, if desired.
